# Rustyline helper implementation for command completion (2026-03-13 10:31Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 5 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-tab-completion-impl-plan.md.

**Task 5: rustyline Helper + Completer (命令补全)**

1. In src/completion.rs add a struct DevShellHelper (can be empty or with phantom data). Implement rustyline's Completer trait:
   - type Candidate = String (String implements rustyline::completion::Candidate).
   - fn complete(&self, line: &str, pos: usize, ctx: &rustyline::Context) -> Result<(usize, Vec<String>)>: call completion_context(line, pos). If None return Ok((pos, vec![])). If Some(ctx) and ctx.kind == Command, call complete_commands(&ctx.prefix) and return Ok((ctx.start, candidates)). Otherwise (Path) return Ok((ctx.start, vec![])).

2. Implement Hinter, Highlighter, Validator for DevShellHelper with empty/minimal behavior so that DevShellHelper can implement Helper:
   - Hinter: hint method return empty string or no hint.
   - Highlighter: highlight method leave line as-is or return ().
   - Validator: validate method return Ok(()) or ValidationResult::Valid.
   Check rustyline 17 docs: pub trait Helper: Completer + Hinter + Highlighter + Validator {} so you must impl all four.

3. Add "use rustyline" and the required submodules (completion, hint, highlight, validate) in completion.rs. Do not add rustyline_derive unless necessary; implement the traits by hand if the crate doesn't provide defaults.

4. cargo build must succeed. Run cargo test to ensure existing tests still pass.

5. Commit: git add src/completion.rs src/lib.rs && git commit -m "feat(completion): rustyline Helper with command completion only"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: what you implemented, any API adjustments for rustyline 17, build/test result, commit.
